name: python3-newt
title: python3-newt
description:
NEWT module for Python3
This module allows you to build a text UI for your Python3 scripts
using newt.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-newt because NEWT module for Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-newt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-newt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-newt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
